name: Phase 31: Session Management Foundation
description: Implement session/ package with Session/SessionStore interfaces, in-memory store, middleware, TTL/eviction policies, gateway affinity, and integration tests.
completion: session/ package exists with full test coverage, gateway affinity works, mcptest integration passes.

tasks.description: Define Session and SessionStore interfaces in session/session.go. Include Session (ID, Get, Set, Delete, Keys, CreatedAt, ExpiresAt), SessionStore (Create, Get, Delete, List), and SessionMiddleware function signature.
Implement InMemorySessionStore in session/store_mem.go with sync.RWMutex, TTL-based eviction on access, and background cleanup goroutine.
Implement SessionMiddleware in session/middleware.go that extracts session ID from request context, loads/creates sessions, and injects into context for downstream handlers.
Add TTL and eviction policy configuration to SessionStore. Support absolute TTL, sliding window TTL, and max sessions limit with LRU eviction.
Add session affinity routing to gateway/. When a session is bound to an upstream, route subsequent requests to the same upstream.
Write comprehensive tests: session/session_test.go (interfaces), session/store_mem_test.go (store lifecycle, concurrent access, TTL, eviction), session/middleware_test.go. Target 90%+ coverage.
Add session/doc.go package documentation, update CLAUDE.md package map and dependency layers, update ROADMAP.md to mark P31 items complete.
